user_system_path: Right-now cards: state-change triggers. Slice 1 shipped the copy/verbiage scrub changing morning brief/daily card terminology to Right Now; Slice 2 decouples card generation from the clock by persisting justified state-change triggers into the live workday-presence loop.
allowed_files_raw: Active Slice 2 trigger path only: workday-presence trigger route, trigger runner, trigger evaluation/persistence helpers, connector-evidence adapters, the narrow regression tests needed to keep current Right Now/continuity proof green, fresh-load trigger override (route.ts + route.test.ts), and button-trim (MorningAnchorCard + right-now.ts)
forbidden_files_raw: No auth/stripe/billing work, no schema migrations, no new dashboard surfaces, no broad cron cleanup outside the active trigger path
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
required_browser_proof: Manual or focused browser proof: exercise one Right Now state-change trigger path and verify the card/state loop is trigger-driven rather than clock-only
acceptance_condition: At least one justified state-change trigger produces a persisted Right Now state and durable receipt through the active workday-presence loop; clock-only generation is no longer the only live path; fresh-load returns trigger-overridden card when fresh signals match
stop_condition: Stop when Slice 2 trigger persistence/wiring is proven on the active path, tests pass, GitHub writeback is posted, and the branch is PR-ready
anti_regression_checks: workday-presence GET still returns a card or justified quiet state
trigger route honors justified state-change inputs
no dead setup fallback returns for the owner path
next_command: Implement and prove Slice 2 trigger-state persistence on the workday-presence loop, then widen trigger semantics toward the issue-named state changes only as needed for proof
